dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the pursuit is not over. Your efforts to {quest_action} led us to a dead end, but {quest_ally} found new signs.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat_The} doubled back toward {quest_focus_the}. The {enemy_type} are providing cover, and they have been massing {location_hint}. We need to push through them to pick up the trail again.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes_The} cannot wait. If we lose the trail now, we lose everything.

dialogueChunks.intro: Bad news, {player_name}. While you were working to {quest_action}, {quest_threat_the} set a trap near {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} nearly walked into it. The {enemy_type} have fortified the area {location_hint}. We need to clear them out before anyone else gets hurt.
dialogueChunks.outro: They are trying to discourage us. Let us show them it will not work.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I was wrong about how far {quest_threat_animate_the} would go. Since you started to {quest_action}, they have lashed out at {quest_stakes_the} directly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It is personal now. {quest_ally} confirmed that {enemy_type} were sent to {quest_focus_the} as a distraction while the real target fled {location_hint}. We need to cut through them and end this.
dialogueChunks.outro: End this pursuit once and for all. I am counting on you.
